plan.description: Create implementation plan with phases and risks
plan.template:
The user wants a plan for: $ARGUMENTS.

Search the codebase for patterns. Break into phases with dependencies, risks, and complexity. Present the plan and WAIT for confirmation. Do NOT write code.

build-fix.description: Fix build and type errors incrementally
build-fix.template: Fix build errors in this project. Detect the build system, run the build, parse errors, fix one at a time with minimal changes, re-run after each fix, and report results. Fix one error at a time.

code-review.description: Review local changes or GitHub PR
code-review.template:
Code review for: $ARGUMENTS.

If blank or text: review local uncommitted changes. Run git diff --name-only HEAD, read each file, check for CRITICAL (secrets, injections), HIGH (code quality), MEDIUM (best practices) issues. Block on CRITICAL/HIGH.

If a PR number or URL: fetch with gh CLI, read files, review across 7 categories (correctness, type safety, security, performance, completeness, maintainability, patterns), run validation, publish review.

security-scan.template: Run security scan on this project. Check for hardcoded secrets, prompt injection risks, misconfigurations. Report findings by severity.

refactor-clean.description: Remove dead code and consolidate duplicates
refactor-clean.template: Find and remove dead code in this project. Look for unused exports, duplicate code, orphaned files. Consolidate where possible. Verify tests still pass.

quality-gate.template: Run the quality pipeline: lint, typecheck, tests, coverage check, security scan. Report results and block if any check fails.

checkpoint.template: Save current state as a checkpoint. Record: changed files, test status, lint status, build status.

test-coverage.template: Check test coverage in this project. Find uncovered files. Suggest what to test. Target 80%+ coverage.

flutter-review.template: Review Flutter/Dart changes. Find changed .dart files with git diff. Check for: widget perf, missing const, oversized builds, state management issues, null safety, a11y. Run dart analyze. Report findings.

flutter-build.template: Fix Flutter build errors. Run flutter build, parse errors, fix one at a time, re-run. Run flutter analyze after fixes.

flutter-test.template: Run flutter test. Report failures. If failures found, fix one at a time and re-run. Run with --coverage and report percentage.

react-review.template: React/JSX review. Find changed .tsx/.jsx files. Check: hooks rules, RSC boundaries, a11y, render performance, security. Run eslint with react-hooks plugin. Report findings.

react-build.template: Fix React build errors. Detect bundler (Vite/webpack/Next.js), run build, parse errors, fix one at a time.

react-test.template: Run React tests. Detect framework (Vitest/Jest), run tests with coverage. Fix failures incrementally.

go-review.template: Go code review. Find changed .go files. Run go vet, staticcheck if available. Check concurrency, error handling, idiomatic Go. Report findings.

go-build.template: Fix Go build errors. Run go build ./..., parse errors, fix one at a time.

go-test.template: Run go test ./... with -cover. Report failures and coverage. Fix incrementally.

rust-review.template: Rust code review. Find changed .rs files. Run cargo clippy. Check ownership, error handling, unsafe usage. Report findings.

rust-build.template: Fix Rust build errors. Run cargo build, parse errors, fix one at a time (borrow checker, types, deps).

rust-test.template: Run cargo test with --nocapture. Report failures and fix incrementally.

python-review.template: Python code review. Find changed .py files. Check: PEP 8, type hints, error handling, security. Run ruff or pylint if available. Report findings.

cpp-review.template: C++ code review. Find changed .cpp/.h files. Check: memory safety, modern C++ idioms, concurrency, UB. Report findings.

cpp-build.template: Fix C++ build errors. Detect CMake/Make, run build, parse errors, fix one at a time.

cpp-test.template: Run C++ tests with CTest or framework binary. Report failures and fix incrementally.

kotlin-review.template: Kotlin code review. Find changed .kt files. Check: idiomatic Kotlin, coroutine safety, null safety, clean architecture. Report findings.

kotlin-build.template: Fix Kotlin/Gradle build errors. Run ./gradlew build, parse errors, fix one at a time.

kotlin-test.template: Run Kotlin tests with ./gradlew test. Report failures and coverage.

learn.template: Extract patterns and learnings from this session. Identify: recurring patterns, decisions made, useful commands. Save to memory.

model-route.description: Recommend best model for task complexity
model-route.template: Analyze the current task and recommend the best model tier (small/cheap vs large/powerful) based on complexity. Consider: file count, cross-cutting concerns, design ambiguity.

setup-pm.template: Detect available package managers (npm, pnpm, yarn, bun) and configure the preferred one for this project.

update-codemaps.template: Scan the codebase and update codemaps. Document: entry points, key files, architecture layers, data flow. Write to docs/CODEMAPS/.

update-docs.template: Review recent git changes and update relevant documentation files. Focus on: new features, changed APIs, updated dependencies.

aside.template:
Quick question: $ARGUMENTS.

Answer concisely. Do not change any files. Do not switch context.
